## Summary

Describe the change and why it matters.

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org`

## Notes

- [ ] I did not commit browser profiles, cookies, prompt history, snapshots, tokens, SMTP credentials, or `.env` files.
- [ ] I updated README or docs for user-facing behavior changes.
- [ ] I noted provider account state tested if this changes provider automation.
